title: BEM-867 wire queue processor
objective:
Run script:
"""
runner = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
step = '''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue after commit\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: |\n          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Job summary\n'
if 'Process workflow dispatch queue after commit' not in text:
    if anchor in text:
        text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
    else:
        text = text.rstrip() + step + '\n'
runner.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_WIRED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 queue processor wired\nStatus: PATCHED\nStep: Process workflow dispatch queue after commit\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(runner))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('wired workflow dispatch queue processor for BEM867')
"""
